data.description: This rule describes the conditions or effects that occur within a specific area.

1action
Time:
Range:
Self
Components: V,S
Duration: Up to hours

I action
Time: bonus
Range:
Self
Components:
Duration:
You can spend a movement action to gain an extra 5 feet of movement for the current turn. This doesn't increase your speed.
